name: Spring Volleyball Cup
description: A vibrant spring tournament bringing together top local volleyball teams in Beirut for an exciting and competitive kickoff to the season.

name: Champions Clash
description: An intense mid-season showdown where elite teams compete for dominance in a high-stakes tournament held in historic Byblos.

name: National Volleyball Final
description: The ultimate national championship where the best teams across the country compete for the prestigious title and grand prize.

name: Coastal Volleyball Showdown
description: A dynamic coastal tournament featuring competitive teams battling it out near the seaside in a lively and energetic atmosphere.

name: Winter Volleyball Championship
description: A competitive winter tournament held in Zahle, showcasing strong performances and concluding with an exciting championship match.
